project.name: vm-monit
project.description: Grafana Host Monitoring Stack — a centralized, containerized observability solution for host systems and Docker containers, combining metrics collection (Prometheus + exporters), optional log aggregation (Loki + Alloy), visualization (Grafana), and alerting (AlertManager).
project.architecture: Centralized monitoring — Core metrics (Node Exporter, cAdvisor, Prometheus, Grafana, AlertManager, Blackbox) + optional logging profile (Loki, Alloy)
services: loki (grafana/loki:3.3.2) — log aggregation with filesystem storage [optional: --profile logs]
alloy (grafana/alloy:v1.9.1) — log collection from journal, system files, Docker containers [optional: --profile logs]

agent_infrastructure.description: Complete agent infrastructure for autonomous work on this repository. Read in order when starting any session.

state.description: Current project state, task backlog, and decision history. Update every session.

templates.description: Checklists for common operations: new features, new endpoints/scrape targets, testing, bug fixes.

conventions.shell_scripts: descriptive-name.sh with colored output functions, argument parsing, main entry point
conventions.docker_images: Always pinned to specific version tags (no :latest)
conventions.bash_variables: UPPER_SNAKE_CASE for constants, snake_case for local variables

security_summary: No hardcoded secrets. .env gitignored. Default Grafana credentials (admin/admin). AlertManager null receiver. No TLS. No auth on Prometheus/Loki/AlertManager. All images pinned to specific versions.
task_queue_summary: 9 tasks total: 3 high (security remediation), 3 medium (config consistency), 3 low (feature enhancement). See .claude/state/TASK_QUEUE.md for details.
